terminal-face.$value: monospaced terminal UI typography, readable large headline, precise pane labels, no fake paragraph blocks

screenshot-aesthetic.$value: authentic SSH terminal product screenshot atmosphere, dark TUI workspace, three-pane layout, left tasks sidebar, center Claude Code engine pane, right changes and shell panes, tmux-like borders, orange active selection, muted gray labels, green diff counters

launch-polish.$value: turn the raw screenshot into a polished promotional hero while preserving real terminal density, black background, orange KOBE brand accent, pane dividers, keyboard shortcut footer, and agent orchestration workflow

global-exclude.$value: browser chrome, glossy SaaS cards, cartoon mascot, fake unreadable paragraphs, random icons, stock photo, excessive neon, cluttered sci-fi dashboard, malformed main headline, watermark

campaign.name: kobe-screenshot-launch
campaign.brief: kobe 宣发主视觉：基于真实 TUI 截图的科技感版本

content.headline: Run parallel coding agents from any terminal.
content.subject: a polished but authentic promotional hero based on the provided kobe TUI screenshot: keep the dark terminal interface, orange KOBE accent, left task list, center Claude Code engine pane, right changes and shell panes, keyboard shortcut footer, and SSH-friendly terminal product feel; show kobe as a real terminal IDE for parallel AI coding agents, not a generic SaaS dashboard

resolved_style.name: launch-hero

assets.prompt:
Brand style: authentic SSH terminal product screenshot atmosphere, dark TUI workspace, three-pane layout, left tasks sidebar, center Claude Code engine pane, right changes and shell panes, tmux-like borders, orange active selection, muted gray labels, green diff counters, turn the raw screenshot into a polished promotional hero while preserving real terminal density, black background, orange KOBE brand accent, pane dividers, keyboard shortcut footer, and agent orchestration workflow
Campaign brief: kobe 宣发主视觉：基于真实 TUI 截图的科技感版本
Subject: a polished but authentic promotional hero based on the provided kobe TUI screenshot: keep the dark terminal interface, orange KOBE accent, left task list, center Claude Code engine pane, right changes and shell panes, keyboard shortcut footer, and SSH-friendly terminal product feel; show kobe as a real terminal IDE for parallel AI coding agents, not a generic SaaS dashboard
Deliverable: hero-card, 1200x630px
Headline text to render exactly: "Run parallel coding agents from any terminal."
Use only this brand palette unless natural lighting requires subtle neutrals: #10110F, #14191F, #E87855, #87D982, #8C8C86
Typography direction for visible text: monospaced terminal UI typography, readable large headline, precise pane labels, no fake paragraph blocks
Respect brand reference assets: workspace/products/codefox/kobe/references/kobe-tui-screenshot.png
Keep the locked brand style constant; vary only the campaign content and composition for this deliverable.
assets.negative_prompt: browser chrome, glossy SaaS cards, cartoon mascot, fake unreadable paragraphs, random icons, stock photo, excessive neon, cluttered sci-fi dashboard, malformed main headline, watermark

content.positioning: A focused family of developer tools for agentic software work.

elements.description: A visual rail connecting locked style tokens to versioned campaign artifacts.
Make the actual product or workflow the first visual signal; avoid generic abstract SaaS imagery.

accepted.notes: Accepted as a CodeFox logo-led launch direction.

product.positioning: SSH-friendly TUI for running parallel coding agents in isolated worktrees.
audience: developers working over SSH, devboxes, or VPS hosts

accepted_styles: real terminal panes as the product focal point
dark TUI with warm editorial contrast
rejected_styles: abstract dashboard with unreadable fake UI

elements.description: Left task list, central agent engine pane, right changes and shell panes.
